The '''Battle of Belderone''' occurred after [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] came in orbit of [[Belderone/Legends|Belderone]] to investigate [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] unrest in the neighboring system of [[Kulthis]].

==Battle==
The Rebels landed on Belderone to prepare for an impending attack on Kulthis, under the ruse of trading with the planet. Their arrival caused the citizens to gather around their ship the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], and two citizens, [[Flint]] and [[Barney]], saw [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] clipped to his belt and deduced that he was a Jedi. They finally asked if he was a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]]. Not wanting to blow his cover, Luke said the lightsaber was given to him by a friend of his father's. The group was later given a place to stay at a tavern. An unknown spy of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Andrid]] revealed their location to him, and three agents were sent to capture Skywalker. The Rebels dodged the blaster fire while moving Zana away from the crossfire. They eventually defeated the Imperials. When Vader learned that Andrid knew Skywalker's location and had kept it secret from him, he killed Andrid using [[Telekinesis/Legends|Force Choke]].

Vader, due to Andrid's ego, rushed his plan to capture Skywalker and defeat the Rebels by deploying a squad of [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]] walkers fresh from the factory's assembly line to destroy the neighboring village in a test run, then be picked up by bulk cruisers and used to attack Kulthis. Luke alerted the Rebels on Kulthis about the Empire's presence on Belderone. As a result the Rebel leaders sent a wing of [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wings]] and [[Snowspeeder/Legends|Snowspeeders]] to take down the walkers before they destroyed the village and the Rebel base. Luke's X-wing was shot down and forced to land on a walker; a second walker was preparing to shoot the downed fighter but was intercepted by another walker captured by [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]. Most of the AT-ATs were captured or destroyed, although one walker made it to the village and trampled over [[Zana]]'s Diner with Zana inside.

==Aftermath==
The battle was a Rebel victory, but Flint, grieving over his mother's death, joined the Empire.
